SEARCH
Package io.github.michaelcirkl.ubsa

Class Blob

java.lang.Object
io.github.michaelcirkl.ubsa.Blob
public class Blob extends Object
Provider-neutral representation of a blob/object and its associated metadata.

Instances returned by listing or metadata-only operations may omit getContent(). Timestamp fields are stored in UTC.

  • Method Details

    • getContent

      public byte[] getContent()
      Returns the blob content loaded into memory.

      BlobStorageSyncClient.getBlobMetadata(String, String), BlobStorageAsyncClient.getBlobMetadata(String, String), listing operations, and other metadata-only reads return null.

    • getSize

      public long getSize()
      Returns the blob size in bytes.

    • getKey

      public String getKey()

    • lastModified

      public LocalDateTime lastModified()
      Returns the provider-reported last-modified timestamp.

      UBSA converts timezone-aware provider timestamps to UTC.

    • encoding

      public String encoding()
      Returns the content encoding reported by the provider.

    • getEtag

      public String getEtag()
      Returns the provider ETag, typically an identifier for a specific version of the blob content.

    • getUserMetadata

      public Map<String,String> getUserMetadata()
      Returns user-defined metadata attached to the blob.

    • getPublicURI

      public URI getPublicURI()
      Returns a provider-specific URI for this blob.

      This value is intended for identification and linking. It does not guarantee anonymous/public access.

    • getBucket

      public String getBucket()

    • expires

      public LocalDateTime expires()
      Returns the blob expiry timestamp when the provider exposes it.

      UBSA converts timezone-aware provider timestamps to UTC.

    • builder

      public static Blob.Builder builder()
